description: Shared Renovate preset for the anolishq org.
Use in a repo's renovate.json via: "extends": ["local>anolishq/renovate-config"].
Automerge scope is conservative: GitHub Action digests, dev/lint/test tooling (non-major), and lock-file maintenance. All runtime dependency bumps and majors stay manual.
Keep only repo-specific rules in each repo (e.g. version blocks, ecosystem groupings).

packageRules.description: Group GitHub Actions, pin to digests, and automerge them once CI passes — after a 3-day supply-chain soak (third-party GitHub Actions are a prime supply-chain vector). First-party anolishq actions are exempted below.

First-party anolishq reusable workflows/actions track the deliberately-released v2 tag (not @main), so they don't churn — and the third-party supply-chain soak must NOT apply, or it holds the OLD digest as canonical and reverts fixes for 3 days. Adopt new first-party releases immediately.
Supply-chain safety: hold npm and PyPI updates for 3 days after release
Group Python dev tooling (ruff, pytest, mypy, type stubs)
Automerge non-major Python dev tooling once CI passes
Automerge non-major JS/TS dev dependencies (eslint, prettier, types, test tooling) once CI passes
